# Phuket Airport Fast Track — VIP Meet & Assist Service

> Fast Track Phuket is the longest-operating VIP airport meet-and-assist service at Phuket International Airport (HKT), Thailand. Operating since 2013, we provide personal escort through immigration and customs, reducing wait times from 60+ minutes to under 5 minutes. **We operate 24/7, serving all international flights daily.**

Key facts:
- Official VIP partner of Phuket Airport (HKT) since 2013
- Over 10,000 travelers processed
- Immigration processing in under 5 minutes vs 60+ minutes standard
- Available for all international flights at HKT
- **Operating Hours: 24/7 (365 days/year)**
- Address: 222 Mai Khao, Thalang District, Phuket 83110, Thailand
- Multilingual service: English, Russian, Chinese, Hindi, Hebrew, Arabic, Spanish, French, German, Italian
- Lowest price guarantee: From ฿1,600 per person

## Services & Pricing

- [Arrival Fast Track](https://fast-track-phuket.com/#packages): Personal meet at gate, express immigration lane, terminal guidance — **From ฿1,600 per person**
- [Departure VIP](https://fast-track-phuket.com/#packages): Meet at terminal, priority check-in, express passport control — **From ฿1,600 per person**
- [Combo Package (Arrival + Departure)](https://fast-track-phuket.com/#packages): Full round-trip VIP service — **From ฿3,100 per person**
- [Children under 12](https://fast-track-phuket.com/#pricing): 50% discount on all packages
- [Infants 0-2 years](https://fast-track-phuket.com/#pricing): Always FREE

## What's Included

- [VIP vs Regular Comparison](https://fast-track-phuket.com/): Under 5 min processing, personal concierge gate-to-exit, dedicated VIP lane, real-time flight tracking, aircraft bridge pickup, mandatory form assistance, 24/7 support
- [TDAC Guide](https://fast-track-phuket.com/): Free step-by-step guide for Thailand Digital Arrival Card (mandatory for 2026)

## FAQ

- [Flight delay policy](https://fast-track-phuket.com/): Free automatic rescheduling (we work 24/7), full refund on cancellation
- [TDAC requirements](https://fast-track-phuket.com/): All travelers must complete TDAC; Combo Package includes assistance
- [Booking advice](https://fast-track-phuket.com/): Book 24h ahead; 48-72h in peak season (Nov-Mar). Emergency same-day bookings may be possible.
- [Airline coverage](https://fast-track-phuket.com/): All international flights at HKT, **available 24 hours daily**

## Contact & Booking (Available 24/7)

- [WhatsApp](https://wa.me/66643162330): **+66 6-4316-2330** (Main Contact, Instant Response)
- [Telegram](https://t.me/fasttrackphuket): Instant response 24/7
- [Website](https://fast-track-phuket.com/): Full context, booking calculator
